Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: SELECT "_subs"."result_id", "_fld_resp"."root" AS "result" FROM UNNEST($1::text[], $2::json[]) AS "_subs"("result_id", "result_vars") LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT json_build_object('departments_aggregate', (WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments") SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') FROM (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."name" AS "name", "_root.r.files_aggregate"."files_aggregate" AS "files_aggregate", "_root.r.employees_aggregate"."employees_aggregate" AS "employees_aggregate") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."department_files" WHERE "department_id" = "_root.base"."id") SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') FROM (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.file"."file" AS "file") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.file.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "storage"."files" WHERE "_root.base"."file_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.file.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "file" FROM "_root.r.file.base") AS "_root.r.file" ON ('true')) AS "_root")) AS "files_aggregate") AS "_root.r.files_aggregate" ON ('true') LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."user_departments" WHERE "department_id" = "_root.base"."id") SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') FROM (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.user"."user" AS "user") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.user.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "auth"."users" WHERE "_root.base"."user_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.user.base"."display_name" AS "displayName") AS "_e")) AS "user" FROM "_root.r.user.base") AS "_root.r.user" ON ('true')) AS "_root")) AS "employees_aggregate") AS "_root.r.employees_aggregate" ON ('true')) AS "_root")) AS "departments_aggregate")) AS "root") AS "_fld_resp" ON ('true')
